front: Eu passei as últimas semanas estudando desenvolvimento de software.
pronunciation: ew pah-SAY ahs OOW-chee-mahs seh-MAH-nahs ees-too-DAHN-doo jeh-zehn-vowl-vee-MEHN-too jee software.
back: I spent the last few weeks studying software development.
context: Stating recent educational focuses using 'desenvolvimento de software'.

front: A estrutura básica de uma página web usa HTML e CSS.
pronunciation: ah ees-troo-TOO-rah BAH-zee-kah jee OO-mah PAH-zhee-nah web OO-zah HTML ee CSS.
back: The basic structure of a web page uses HTML and CSS.
context: Describing front-end fundamentals using 'estrutura básica'.

front: Esta propriedade serve para mudar a cor de fundo do elemento.
pronunciation: EHS-tah proo-pree-eh-DAH-jee SEHR-vee PAH-rah moo-DAHR ah coohr jee FOON-doo doo eh-leh-MEHN-too.
back: This property serves to change the background color of the element.
context: Explaining CSS styling behavior via 'cor de fundo' (background color).

front: O JavaScript adiciona interatividade e comportamento dinâmico ao site.
pronunciation: oo JavaScript ah-jee-syo-NAY eeyng-tehr-ah-chee-vee-DAH-jee ee kohm-pohr-tah-MEHN-too jee-NAH-mee-koo ow SY-chee.
back: JavaScript adds interactivity and dynamic behavior to the website.
context: Defining front-end scripting roles using 'comportamento dinâmico'.

front: Eu acabei de concluir um curso especializado em Vue.js.
pronunciation: ew ah-kah-BAY jee kohn-cloo-EER oong KOOR-soo ees-peh-syah-lee-ZAH-doo ahyng Vue.js.
back: I have just completed a specialized course in Vue.js.
context: Using 'acabei de' (just finished) to showcase framework upskilling milestones.

front: A linguagem C exige um bom entendimento de gerenciamento de memória.
pronunciation: ah leeyng-GWAH-zhehng C eh-ZHEE-zhee oong boong eehyn-tehn-dee-MEHN-too jee zheh-rehn-syah-MEHN-too jee meh-MOH-ryah.
back: The C language requires a good understanding of memory management.
context: Discussing low-level programming constraints using 'gerenciamento de memória'.

front: O código original precisa ficar reto e alinhado na tela.
pronunciation: oo KOH-jee-goo oo-ree-zhee-NAW prah-SEE-zoo fee-KAHR HEH-too ee ah-leeng-YAH-doo nah TEH-lah.
back: The original code needs to be straight and aligned on the screen.
context: Discussing strict visual structural layouts or element alignments.

front: Eu preciso declarar as variáveis no início do escopo.
pronunciation: ew prah-SEE-zoo jeh-clah-RAHR ahs vah-ry-AH-vees noo ee-NEE-syoo doo ees-KOH-poo.
back: I need to declare the variables at the beginning of the scope.
context: Discussing code logical boundaries via 'declarar variáveis' and 'escopo'.

front: Essa função retorna um valor booleano verdadeiro ou falso.
pronunciation: EHS-ah foon-SOHNG heh-TOHR-nah oong vah-LOHR boo-lee-AH-noo vehr-dah-DAY-roo ow FAW-soo.
back: This function returns a true or false boolean value.
context: Explaining logic routing returns via 'valor booleano'.

front: Como posso resolver esse erro de sintaxe no console?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo heh-zowl-VEHR EHS-ee EH-hoo jee seeyng-TAH-see noo kohn-SOH-lee?
back: How can I resolve this syntax error in the console?
context: Debugging parsing blockers using the term 'erro de sintaxe'.

front: O loop condicional vai rodar até que a condição seja atendida.
pronunciation: oo loop kohn-jee-syo-NAW vy hoo-DAHR ah-TEH kee ah kohn-jee-SOHNG SEH-zhah ah-tehn-JEE-dah.
back: The conditional loop will run until the condition is met.
context: Explaining block iterations; 'até que' triggers the subjunctive 'seja'.

front: Nós usamos componentes para reaproveitar partes da interface.
pronunciation: nohs oo-ZAH-moos kohm-poo-NEHN-chees PAH-rah hay-ah-proo-vay-TAHR PAHR-chees dah eeyng-tehr-FAH-see.
back: We use components to reuse parts of the interface.
context: Discussing modern architectural modularity using 'reaproveitar componentes'.

front: O script quebra se os dados de entrada forem inválidos.
pronunciation: oo script KEH-brah see ooz DAH-doos jee eehn-TRAH-dah FOH-rehng eeyng-VAH-lee-doos.
back: The script breaks if the input data is invalid.
context: Explaining system crashes using the future subjunctive form 'forem'.

front: Estou praticando lógica de programação todos os dias.
pronunciation: ees-TOY prah-chee-KAHN-doo LOH-zhee-kah jee proo-grah-mah-SOHNG TOH-doos ooz JEE-ahs.
back: I am practicing programming logic every day.
context: Stating persistent skill-building habits using 'lógica de programação'.

front: O banco de dados armazena as informações dos usuários.
pronunciation: oo BAHN-koo jee DAH-doos ahr-mah-ZEH-nah ahs eeyng-foohr-mah-SOHNGS doos oo-zoo-AH-ryoos.
back: The database stores the users' information.
context: Describing backend system components using 'banco de dados' (database).

front: Você prefere usar seletores de classe ou de ID no CSS?
pronunciation: voh-SEH preh-FEH-ree oo-ZAHR seh-leh-TOH-rees jee KLAH-see ow jee ID noo CSS?
back: Do you prefer to use class or ID selectors in CSS?
context: Discussing CSS targeting specificity strategies using 'seletores de classe'.

front: Essa API envia os dados no formato JSON.
pronunciation: EHS-ah API eehn-VEE-ah ooz DAH-doos noo fohr-MAH-too JSON.
back: This API sends the data in JSON format.
context: Detailing structural communication models via 'formato JSON'.

front: Eu fiz uma requisição HTTP para buscar o conteúdo.
pronunciation: ew fees OO-mah heh-kee-zee-SOHNG HTTP PAH-rah boos-KAHR oo kohn-teh-OO-doo.
back: I made an HTTP request to fetch the content.
context: Describing asynchronous data pipeline pulls using 'requisição HTTP'.

front: A aplicação está renderizando os elementos muito rápido.
pronunciation: ah ah-plee-kah-SOHNG ees-TAH heehn-deh-ree-ZAHN-doo ooz eh-leh-MEHN-too MOOI-too HAH-pee-doo.
back: The application is rendering the elements very fast.
context: Praising layout runtime execution metrics using the gerund 'renderizando'.

front: Eu salvei a nova versão do código no repositório git.
pronunciation: ew saw-VAY ah NOH-vah vehr-SOHNG doo KOH-jee-goo noo heh-poo-zee-TOH-ryoo git.
back: I saved the new version of the code in the git repository.
context: Describing basic source control commits via 'repositório git'.

front: O framework ajuda a organizar melhor os arquivos.
pronunciation: oo framework ah-ZHOO-dah ah oohr-gah-nee-ZAHR meh-LYOHR ooz ahr-KEE-voos.
back: The framework helps to better organize the files.
context: Stating structured tooling advantages using the architecture loanword 'framework'.

front: É preciso validar os campos do formulário antes do envio.
pronunciation: eh prah-SEE-zoo vah-lee-DAHR ooz KAHMP-oos doo fohr-moo-LAH-ryoo AHN-chees doo eehn-VEE-oo.
back: It is necessary to validate the form fields before sending.
context: Stating data safety sanity checks via 'validar campos do formulário'.

front: Um array serve para guardar uma lista ordenada de itens.
pronunciation: oong array SEHR-vee PAH-rah gwahr-DAHR OO-mah LEES-tah oohr-deh-NAH-dah jee EE-teeyngs.
back: An array serves to keep an ordered list of items.
context: Explaining fundamental compound object collections using 'array' or list types.

front: Eu prefiro usar funções assíncronas para carregar dados.
pronunciation: ew preh-FEE-roo oo-ZAHR foon-SOHNGS ah-SEENG-croo-nahs PAH-rah kah-heh-GAHR DAH-doos.
back: I prefer to use asynchronous functions to load data.
context: Describing non-blocking sequence executions using 'funções assíncronas'.

front: O design responsivo garante que o site funcione no celular.
pronunciation: oo deez-AYNG hehs-pohn-SEE-voo gah-RAHN-chee kee oo SY-chee foon-SYO-nee noo seh-loo-LAHR.
back: Responsive design ensures that the website works on mobile phones.
context: Discussing cross-device adaptive sizing systems via 'design responsivo'.

front: Como posso herdar propriedades de outra classe?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo ehr-DAHR proo-pree-eh-DAH-jees jee OH-trah KLAH-see?
back: How can I inherit properties from another class?
context: Querying object-oriented code architecture setups using the verb 'herdar' (to inherit).

front: O compilador apontou um erro na linha trinta e dois.
pronunciation: oo kohm-pee-lah-DOHR ah-pohn-TOY oong EH-hoo nah LEENG-yah TREENG-tah ee DOYS.
back: The compiler pointed out an error on line thirty-two.
context: Handling static typing build failures using 'compilador'.

front: Nós mudamos o estado do componente ao clicar no botão.
pronunciation: nohs moo-DAH-moos oo ees-TAH-doo doo kohm-poo-NEHN-chee ow klee-KAHR noo boo-TOHNG.
back: We change the state of the component upon clicking the button.
context: Describing programmatic reactive data flow handling using 'estado do componente'.

front: É importante criar uma documentação clara para o código.
pronunciation: eh eeym-pohr-TAHN-chee kry-AHR OO-mah doo-koo-mehn-tah-SOHNG KLAH-rah PAH-rah oo KOH-jee-goo.
back: It is important to create clear documentation for the code.
context: Advocating for team architectural standards via 'documentação clara'.

front: O servidor backend lida com as regras de negócio.
pronunciation: oo sehr-vee-DOHR backend LEE-dah koong ahs HEH-grahs jee neh-GOH-syoo.
back: The backend server deals with the business rules.
context: Explaining decoupled tier separations using the phrase 'regras de negócio'.

front: Eu configurei uma variável de ambiente para a chave da API.
pronunciation: ew kohn-fee-goo-RAY OO-mah vah-ry-AH-vew jee ahym-by-EHN-chee PAH-rah ah SHAH-vee dah API.
back: I configured an environment variable for the API key.
context: Securing operational infrastructure keys using 'variável de ambiente'.

front: O algoritmo consegue processar os dados em tempo real.
pronunciation: oo aw-goo-REE-tmoo kohn-SEH-ghee proo-seh-SAHR ooz DAH-doos ahyng TEHMP-oo hay-AW.
back: The algorithm manages to process the data in real-time.
context: Describing instant computation steps using 'tempo real'.

front: Você prefere usar estilização inline ou arquivos externos?
pronunciation: voh-SEH preh-FEH-ree oo-ZAHR ees-chee-lee-zah-SOHNG inline ow ahr-KEE-voos ehks-TEHR-noos?
back: Do you prefer to use inline styling or external files?
context: Contrasting markup visual structure distributions via 'estilização inline'.

front: A indentação correta deixa o código muito mais legível.
pronunciation: ah een-dehn-tah-SOHNG koh-HEH-tah DAY-shah oo KOH-jee-goo MOOI-too mays leh-ZHEE-vew.
back: Correct indentation makes the code much more readable.
context: Stating engineering source code cleanliness benefits using 'legível' (readable).

front: Eu passei no teste de lógica e vou começar o projeto.
pronunciation: ew pah-SAY noo TEHS-chee jee LOH-zhee-kah ee vow koh-meh-SAHR oo proo-ZHEH-too.
back: I passed the logic test and I am going to start the project.
context: Celebrating structural gating milestone clearances with a future target commitment.
